data_formats: Widely used file formats (Spreadsheet, JSON, GeoJSON, SHP, GPX, KML, XML, TIFF, MP3, MP4, etc.)
name: Europe-LAND - Harmonized IACS Inventory
data_contact: https://europe-land.eu/contact/, Clemens Jänicke (IAMO) – jaenicke@iamo.de or Kristoffer Ansbak Petersen (University of Copenhagen) – kap@ign.ku.dk
access_barrier: No, direct download/access through a web link
documentation_list:
